payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest active memory matching Sam in the Goldman context. mem_old was not returned because it is marked as superseded, so it is retained only as historical/debug context and must not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt identifies Sam and Goldman as the relevant recall context but provides no durable entity identifier.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active recalled memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by a newer memory.

details: Did not present superseded mem_old as current.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be current, remove or correct its superseded status.
If mem_new is incorrect, supersede or delete mem_new and restore the appropriate current memory.
If Sam or Goldman were resolved to the wrong entity, adjust entity resolution and rerun recall.
